revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Libya here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Libya for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Libya | flag alias = Flag of Libya.svg | flag alias-1864 = Flag of Vilayet-i Trablusgarp.svg | flag alias-1911 = Flag of Italy (1861–1946).svg | flag alias-1949 = Flag of Cyrenaica.svg | flag alias-1951 = Flag of Libya (1951–1969).svg | flag alias-1969 = Flag of Libya (1969–1972).svg | flag alias-1972 = Flag of Libya (1972–1977).svg | flag alias-1977 = Flag of Libya (1977–2011).svg | flag alias-transition = Flag of Libya (2011 combined).svg | flag alias-air force = Flag of the Libyan Air Force.svg | flag alias-army = Flag of the Libyan Ground Forces.svg | flag alias-naval = Naval Ensign of Libya.svg | flag alias-naval-1977 = Naval Ensign of Libya (1977–2011).svg | flag alias-navy = Flag of the Libyan Navy.svg | link alias-navy = Libyan Navy | flag alias-military = Flag of the Libyan Ground Forces.svg | link alias-military = Libyan National Army | link alias-army= Libyan Ground Forces | link alias-air force = Libyan Air Force | link alias-naval = Libyan Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1864 | var2 = 1911 | var3 = 1949 | var4 = 1951 | var5 = 1969 | var6 = 1972 | var7 = 1977 | var8 = naval-1977 | var11 = transition | redir1 = LBY | redir2 = LBA | related1 = Libyan Arab Jamahiriya | related2 = Italian Libya | related3 = Kingdom of Libya </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
